findings.message: all 6 artifact types present exactly once
reporting period 2028-Q2 is well formed
all 8 referenced entity codes are registered
all 8 entity codes are unique
every entity's parent is defined and the top parent is a root
every ownership chain reaches the top parent without a cycle
all 6 intercompany pairs are two-sided
all 6 intercompany pairs are reciprocal to the cent
no entity holds a balance against itself
all 11 advances and repayments move between two entities
all 13 transaction amounts are positive
the ledger totals foot from the transaction lines
all 6 due-from balances roll forward from the ledger
all 13 transactions fall inside the reporting window
all 2 equity fundings originate in the Capital group
all 2 regional equity fundings match their project region
all 4 Services/predevelopment fundings come from the top parent
advance 13 runs from NWCP to WCAP (up the chain); an advance that is not to a descendant is often a distribution or sweep and wants classifying
the guarantor meets its minimum liquidity covenant
all 8 entities report non-negative cash
all 7 targeted entities sit inside their band
the ledger is approved and dated
none of the 7 advances reach the review threshold
